title: Urgent Mitigation: Pre-emptive Buffer Stock for SEMI-MCU-32
situation: The Asia-Europe (Suez) shipping lane is currently DISRUPTED due to a high-severity incident. Single-source supplier SUP-001 (SemiTech Asia) is directly impacted, placing critical semiconductor supply (SEMI-MCU-32) at risk. Revenue at risk: $1,152,000; SLA penalties: $680,000.
recommendation: APPROVE — Pre-emptive Buffer Stock Build of 6,400 units to secure supply runway. If shipping delays exceed 14 days, initiate secondary plan: Emergency Airfreight.

auditLog.text: Disruption in Asia-Europe (Suez) lane threatens $1.8M in financial exposure. Current inventory for SEMI-MCU-32 is 12 days, well below the 30-day target buffer. Pre-emptive buffer build mitigates SLA breach risk for BMW and Volkswagen.
APPROVE — Pre-emptive Buffer Stock Build of 6,400 units to secure supply runway. If shipping delays exceed 14 days, initiate secondary plan: Emergency Airfreight.

title: Emergency Mitigation: SEMI-MCU-32 Buffer Build
situation: Asia-Europe (Suez) lane is DISRUPTED. Single-source supplier SUP-001 (SemiTech Asia) is at risk. $1.15M revenue and $680K SLA penalties at stake.
recommendation: APPROVE — Pre-emptive Buffer Stock Build of 6,400 units. If disruptions persist beyond 14 days, secondary recommendation is to proceed with Emergency Airfreight.

auditLog.text: Suez lane disruption threatens $1.83M in exposure. Inventory for SEMI-MCU-32 at 12 days (critical). Pre-emptive buffer build mitigates risk for major customers.
APPROVE — Pre-emptive Buffer Stock Build of 6,400 units. If disruptions persist beyond 14 days, secondary recommendation is to proceed with Emergency Airfreight.

title: CRITICAL Mitigation: Buffer Build for SEMI-MCU-32
situation: Asia-Europe (Suez) disruption causing potential 14-day production halt. Inventory runway for critical part SEMI-MCU-32 is 12 days. Total financial risk $1.28M.
recommendation: APPROVE — Initiate 'Pre-emptive Buffer Stock Build' to secure 60-day stock of SEMI-MCU-32. ERP will be adjusted to pull forward current POs.

auditLog.text: Asia-Europe (Suez) shipping is disrupted with 14+ day delays. SUP-001 (semiconductors) has 12 days inventory, critical to production of ECU modules. Risk of 100% SLA breach for BMW/VW ($1.28M exposure). Pre-emptive buffer build suggested as highest-ranked mitigation.
APPROVE — Initiate 'Pre-emptive Buffer Stock Build' to secure 60-day stock of SEMI-MCU-32. ERP will be adjusted to pull forward current POs.
